story.intro: Woof-woof! Big patrol today, but the whole route's scrambled. Every turn's wrong. Let's put this neighborhood back together!
story.headline: Patrol Route 10
story.chapterStart: Sniff… whoa. This is the most mixed up I've seen it. But I know every inch of this place. We've got this.
story.completion: HA! That's the biggest fix yet. Full patrol, every corner covered. We're unstoppable!

clues.text: Alright! First road's back in place.
Good. That corner was really bugging me.
Sniff-sniff… there's the familiar stretch. Wide open now.
Yes! That was the tough one. Feels great.
More than halfway. The loop's taking shape.
One more piece and I can run the whole thing.
BOOM! Every single road connects. Best patrol yet!
